topbar: ✦ New: Christmas Kindness & Joy — Interactive SEL Activity Book for Kids 4–8 · Free shipping over $45 ✦
about_p1: SenseRevolt™ is a project born from necessity, created by two sisters from Ukraine. Living through profoundly turbulent times, we realized that standard wellness advice simply doesn't work when your nervous system is truly overloaded.
about_p2: We combined our personal struggles and professional skills to build a complete emotional ecosystem — real, working tools to protect mental peace for both adults and children.
subscribe_p: Be the first to know when new somatic tools and SEL collections launch. No spam. Just meaningful updates.
subscribe_note: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe anytime.
faq_q1: Are these books available as physical copies?
faq_a1: Yes! Physical workbooks are available via Amazon and Etsy. Digital PDF versions also available.
faq_q2: What age range are the SEL books designed for?
faq_a2: Our SEL collection is designed for children aged 3–12.
faq_q3: Do I need experience with somatic practices?
faq_a3: Not at all. Each session includes clear instructions and body-check-in cues.
faq_a4: Yes, worldwide through Etsy and Amazon.
faq_a5: Absolutely. Contact us for bulk pricing and licensing.
video_p: Watch how our somatic patterns and SEL tools work — and why they reach the body in ways that words alone can't.
